hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | { read -r f; echo "$f" | grep -qE '\.py$' && "/Users/konrad.malinowski/Documents/Code/AI Engineer /AI/kursy/01-generative-ai-podstawy/chatbot-app/.venv/bin/ruff" check --fix "$f" && "/Users/konrad.malinowski/Documents/Code/AI Engineer /AI/kursy/01-generative-ai-podstawy/chatbot-app/.venv/bin/ruff" format "$f"; } 2>/dev/null || true
